# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.296 — Notice of Suspension or Revocation

A notice of suspension under Section 521.292 (Department’s Determination for License Suspension) or revocation under Section 521.294 (Department’s Determination for License Revocation) must state:

    (1) the reason and statutory grounds for the suspension or revocation;

    (2) the effective date of the suspension or revocation;

    (3) the right of the person to a hearing;

    (4) how to request a hearing; and

    (5) the period in which the person must request a hearing.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1160 (H.B.2466), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A notice of suspension under Section 521.292 (Department’s Determination for License Suspension) or revocation under Section 521.294 (Department’s Determination for License Revocation) must state:

the right of the person to a hearing;

the period in which the person must request a hearing.
